title: Vegan Yukon Muffin
description: A festive French dish featuring nutty and crumbly yukon gold potatoes in a vegan-friendly muffin recipe.

ingredients.name: Almond Meal (or Almond Flour for gluten-free option)
ingredients.notes: Substitute with oat flour for a more crumbly texture

ingredients.name: Vegan Milk or Almond Milk
ingredients.notes: Optional, for better texture and taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease muffin tins.
Mix yukon gold potatoes with brown sugar until smooth. Add flour and almond meal/brown flour, salt, and water or milk. Mix well.
Fill muffin cups about 2/3 full with the potato mixture.
Bake for 18-20 minutes or until tops are golden brown. Let cool slightly before serving.
